violations.text: Shellstock tags were lacking date of last sold/served. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
Chemical taken from bulk supplies was not labelled with common name. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
Gaskets for reach-in cooler were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
